passives.name: Lucky Roll
passives.description: After rolling all dice, reroll the single lowest result and keep the new value.

skills.name: Poisoned Dagger
skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage to a single enemy. Apply Poison (potency = dice result, duration 2 turns). Higher potency wins on reapply; durations add.

skills.name: Knockout
skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage to a single enemy and apply Vulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Eviscerate
skills.description: Strike a single enemy multiple times. Hit count equals sum of the 2 dice. Each hit deals 1 damage (3 if target has any active debuff).

learnable_skills.name: Quick Jab
learnable_skills.description: Deal DEX modifier damage per die assigned to this skill. Exempt from Thousand Cuts double-fire.

learnable_skills.name: Blade Dance
learnable_skills.description: Deal DEX modifier x (dice assigned to all other skills this turn) damage to a single enemy. Blade Dance's own dice do not count.

learnable_skills.name: Crippling Strike
learnable_skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage. Apply Bleed for (dice result) turns. Apply Weak for 1 turn.

learnable_skills.name: Cheap Shot
learnable_skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage. If target has 3 or more total debuff stacks, apply 2 Paralyze.

learnable_skills.name: Evasion
learnable_skills.description: Reduce all incoming damage this turn by dice + DEX. Expires at end of turn.
